name: Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10.75 oz) cream of chicken soup
2 green onions with tops, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into small pieces and place in a Crock-Pot.
2. Add all remaining ingredients except rice.
3. Cover and cook on High for 2 to 4 hours or on Low for 6 to 8 hours.
4. Serve over hot rice.
Serves 4
Double recipe for a 5-quart Crock-Pot.
